ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry data record */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll angle of the aircraft */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle of the aircraft */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw angle of the aircraft */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the aircraft in meters */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the aircraft's position */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the aircraft's position */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of flight data */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight that generated the data */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft that generated the data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the aircraft */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the aircraft */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the flight */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the flight */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure during the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., normal, emergency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Manufacturing date of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft involved in the flight */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight took place */,
  "mission" TEXT /* Mission type of the flight (e.g., test, training) */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* Departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* Arrival airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircrafts ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight data version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the flight data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, audit) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Generated report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
